_meta.description: Explicit allowlist for document intelligence banks that are intentionally not runtime-consumed yet.

notes: Allowlist must contain only non-runtime banks (reports, telemetry-only probes, generation artifacts).
Runtime banks must be accounted for via usage_manifest consumedBankIds/Prefixes/Patterns and proof tests.
pattern_library remains allowlisted while telemetry-only and not used by runtime answer paths.
document_intelligence_implementation_report is generated output from docint:verify, not a runtime bank.
legal_legal_* and medical_med_* doc-type bank IDs are legacy superseded artifacts kept on disk for migration safety; they are not runtime-wired.
docint_eval_suite_registry is test/evaluation-only and intentionally excluded from runtime loading.
